violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Laminate peeling off on the cabinets below the coffee machine and slushie machine.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Hand wash sink is not provided in the facility.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
